name: Dobermann Outis [Limbus Company]
description:
The violent old mutt you adopted from the shelter is acting up.

DEAD DOVE DUE TO: Mentions of SA, War, Torture, Physical & Psychological abuse

Same AU as the Faust one I guess? Might make this a proper series if I find good art of more PJM characters.


Realized my formatting was weird and didn't show the name of the character, just the [LIMBUS COMPANY], so I went through and swapped them back around.

Also this is NOT an Arknights crossover thing just the breed of dog I think matched her the closest.

I just really like making petplay bots so I put a decent bit of effort into this one. You could call it a supplementary reward for meeting the follower goal. I hope you all enjoy!

Art by @Qiujia_

TAGS: Petplay, Pet, Collar, Dog
